title: Apple Reportedly Worked on Two 'Extreme' Chips
excerpt: Apple once developed "M2 Extreme" and "M3 Extreme" chips for the Mac Pro, but it decided not to release them, according to...
content_html:
Apple once developed "M2 Extreme" and "M3 Extreme" chips for the Mac Pro, but it decided not to release them, according to Bloomberg's Mark Gurman. He first reported on this topic in 2022, and he touched on it again in his Power On newsletter today.


"Extreme" chips would have had twice as many CPU and GPU cores as Apple's "Ultra" chips.

"The idea was to offer twice as many graphics and main processing cores as that chip," he said. "In the past, I've called this proposed processor the 'Extreme' chip, which to me is the most sensible Apple marketing name for something above Ultra."

Apple decided not to release the chips due to concerns over higher production costs and limited demand for the Mac Pro, according to Gurman.

Not only did Apple ultimately scrap the "Extreme" chips, but it discontinued the Mac Pro entirely this year following a 20-year run.

Popular Stories

Apple to Release These 20 New Products Across Rest of 2026 and 2027

Apple's annual WWDC developers conference is in the rearview mirror, but there is still a lot to look forward to over the next year and beyond. In his Power On newsletter today, Bloomberg's Mark Gurman listed around 20 products that he expects Apple to release across the remainder of 2026 and 2027. Now that the more intelligent and personal version of Siri has finally arrived in beta, a...

Apple Watch Ultra 4 Expected Later This Year

Apple will unveil the Apple Watch Ultra 4 alongside an Apple Watch Series 12 later this year, according to Bloomberg's Mark Gurman. Writing in his latest Power On newsletter, Gurman plotted out Apple's product roadmap for the rest of the year, including the Phone 18 Pro, Pro Max, and the company's first foldable iPhone. "That flurry of devices should also include an Apple Watch Series 12 and ...

Apple's OLED 'MacBook Ultra' Will Stick With M5 Pro and M5 Max Chips

Apple's upcoming high-end MacBook model featuring an OLED touchscreen display will use the company's current M5 Pro and M5 Max chips, according to Bloomberg's Mark Gurman. The new, top-of-the-line device will launch "between late this year and early next year," Gurman said, adopting the existing high-end Apple silicon chips rather than next-generation M6 versions. Like the MacBook Pro, the...

content_html_zh:
据彭博社的 Mark Gurman 报道，苹果曾为 Mac Pro 开发了“M2 Extreme”和“M3 Extreme”芯片，但决定不发布它们。 他于 2022 年首次报道了这个话题，今天他在 Power On 时事通讯中再次谈到了这个话题。

“Extreme”芯片的 CPU 和 GPU 核心数量是苹果“Ultra”芯片的两倍。

“我们的想法是提供两倍于该芯片的图形和主处理核心，”他说。 “过去，我将这款提议的处理器称为‘Extreme’芯片，对我来说，这是苹果对 Ultra 之上的产品最明智的营销名称。”

古尔曼表示，由于担心生产成本较高以及 Mac Pro 的需求有限，苹果决定不发布这些芯片。

苹果不仅最终废弃了“Extreme”芯片，而且在运行了 20 年之后，它在今年完全停产了 Mac Pro。

Apple 将于 2026 年剩余时间和 2027 年发布这 20 款新产品

苹果一年一度的 WWDC 开发者大会已经成为过去，但明年及以后仍有很多值得期待的事情。 彭博社的马克·古尔曼 (Mark Gurman) 在今天的 Power On 时事通讯中列出了他预计苹果将在 2026 年剩余时间和 2027 年发布的约 20 种产品。 现在，更智能、更个性化的 Siri 版本终于推出测试版了，...

Apple Watch Ultra 4 预计今年晚些时候推出

据彭博社的 Mark Gurman 称，苹果将于今年晚些时候推出 Apple Watch Ultra 4 和 Apple Watch Series 12。 古尔曼在最新的 Power On 时事通讯中写道，规划了苹果今年剩余时间的产品路线图，包括 Phone 18 Pro、Pro Max 和该公司的首款可折叠 iPhone。 “这一系列设备还应该包括 Apple Watch Series 12 和……

苹果的 OLED“MacBook Ultra”将继续使用 M5 Pro 和 M5 Max 芯片

据彭博社的 Mark Gurman 称，苹果即将推出的配备 OLED 触摸屏的高端 MacBook 机型将使用该公司当前的 M5 Pro 和 M5 Max 芯片。 古尔曼表示，这款新的顶级设备将在“今年年底到明年初之间”推出，采用现有的高端苹果芯片，而不是下一代 M6 版本。 与 MacBook Pro 一样，...
